mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.color, c.sort_order, COUNT(i.id) AS item_count FROM food_category c LEFT JOIN food_item i ON i.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.color, c.sort_order ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT id, name, color, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM food_category WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_category (name, color, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{color}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM food_item WHERE category_id = #{id}
